---
title: "Melillo et al. Exploratory Data Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
env = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-01-hf-env.csv")
plantID = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-02-hf-plant-ID.csv")
growth = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-03-hf-growth.csv")
```

Tidying data (descriptive variable names, coercing data types, etc)
```{r}
env = env %>% 
  rename(c(light_treat = treatment, 
           warm_treat = warming, 
           air_temp = AT, 
           ps_act_rad = Q, 
           rel_humid = Rh, 
           water_content = SM, 
           soil_temp_5cm = ST)) %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(year, month, day, sep = "-")),
        chamber = as.factor(chamber),
        light_treat = as.factor(light_treat),
        warm_treat = as.factor(warm_treat))

plantID = plantID %>% 
  mutate(light_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -5)), 
         num_cham = as.factor(
           paste(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -4), 
                 str_split_i(Chamber, "", -3), sep = "")),
         warm_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -1)),
         Site = as.factor(Site),
         Species = as.factor(Species),
         Chamber = as.factor(Chamber),
         GermDate = as.Date(GermDate),
         SpringSeeder = as.Date(SpringSeeder),
         CensInDate = as.Date(CensInDate),
         DatePlanted = as.Date(DatePlanted),
         DeathDate = as.Date(DeathDate),
         CensorDate = as.Date(CensorDate),
         MIA = as.Date(MIA))

growth = growth %>% 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date),
         Species = as.factor(Species),
         Tag = sprintf(Tag, fmt = '%.1f'),
         Chamber = as.factor(Chamber),
         light_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -5)), 
         num_cham = as.factor(
           paste(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -4), 
                 str_split_i(Chamber, "", -3), sep = "")),
         warm_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -1)),
         SpringPhen = as.factor(SpringPhen),
         FallPhen = as.factor(FallPhen), 
         WaterStress = as.ordered(WaterStress))
```
